message:
fix(git): remove test262 submodule and add to gitignore

The test262 directory was accidentally registered as a git submodule
without a URL in .gitmodules, causing CI checkout failures:
  "fatal: No url found for submodule path 'test262' in .gitmodules"

Fix:
- Remove test262 from git index (was registered as submodule)
- Add test262/ and vendor/quickjs-ng/test262/ to .gitignore
- test262 should be cloned at CI time (see .github/workflows/test262.yml)

The test262 suite is cloned during CI runs and should not be committed
to the repository (it's 100MB+ and changes frequently).
